summary: End-to-end frontend testing of the Ethara.AI role-based TPM/CTO/CFO project/top-up/task-log flows. Verified: TPM /projects btn-raise-topup, top-up dialog + toast + new card in /topups (page-tpm-topups); btn-new-topup on /topups; CFO strict read-only (no btn-raise-topup, no btn-new-project, cfo-readonly-badge on ProjectDetail, Read-only pill in phase-drawer, no drawer TPM buttons); Approval Queue Top-up tab lists top-ups (row-tur-*); full 2-stage top-up flow on tur-seed-1: CTO Stage-1 Partial ($2000, comment) -> status pending-cfo -> CFO Stage-2 (Final) with max $2000 from CTO -> Approve full; budget baseline correctly updated (Crowley Generation Approved $48.0k -> $50.0k, Utilization 85% -> 82%). Seeded tur-seed-2 correctly shows CFO Stage-2 (Final) with CTO-forwarded $3000 cap. CRITICAL GAP: TPM cannot reach the phase-drawer (drawer-btn-log-task / drawer-btn-topup / task-log-dialog) because TpmDashboard is a dedicated component that does NOT render ProjectsTable. TpmTaskLogDialog is only used inside ProjectsTable (non-TPM Dashboard), so TPM has NO UI path to log a daily task. PhaseWorkspace exposes btn-add-task but does not use TpmTaskLogDialog / logPhaseTask context.

ui_bugs.issue: TPM has NO path to the phase-drawer. Dashboard.jsx short-circuits to <TpmDashboard/> for role==='TPM', and TpmDashboard does not include ProjectsTable (which owns row-toggle-*, phase-view-*, phase-drawer, drawer-btn-log-task, drawer-btn-topup, task-log-dialog). Consequently, the entire 'TPM logs daily task' feature (TpmTaskLogDialog / logPhaseTask) is unreachable from any TPM screen.

React hydration console errors emitted every time the top-up dialog opens: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by the visual-editor injecting an inline <span data-ve-dynamic="true"> inside each <option> of the Phase <select>. Not a functional bug but pollutes console and is a hydration warning.

issues: Recharts warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' repeats ~10 times on load — ResponsiveContainer parent sizing issue (pre-existing, non-blocking).

action_items: URGENT: Make the phase-drawer reachable for TPM. Either (a) render <ProjectsTable/> inside TpmDashboard (scoped to visibleProjects), or (b) embed <TpmTaskLogDialog/> + drawer-btn-log-task inside PhaseWorkspace (page /projects/:id/phase/:phaseId) since TPM already navigates there via link-upcoming-phase and btn-add-task. Without one of these, the entire 'TPM daily task log' feature is dead code for the TPM role.

Consider also surfacing 'drawer-btn-topup' in PhaseWorkspace so TPM can raise phase-scoped top-ups from the phase page (currently only accessible via /projects btn-raise-topup or /topups btn-new-topup where phase is picked via the tur-phase select — works but is not the phase-drawer flow specified in the requirement).

Fix hydration warning in TopupRequestDialog: the visual-editor is auto-wrapping <option> children in a <span>. Consider rendering the option label via a plain string expression only (already is: {ph.name} · {ph.dates}) — the wrapping is done by the editor toolchain, may need to disable x-source instrumentation for <option> children.
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext.jsx logPhaseTask/updatePhaseTask/deletePhaseTask are wired correctly and 24h edit window via isTaskEditable is enforced in updatePhaseTask (returns unchanged log if window elapsed) and deletePhaseTask (filter keeps locked entries). Solid.

TopupRequestDetail.jsx correctly caps CFO approvedAmt at CTO-forwarded amount via slider max and validation in doCfoPartial (approvedAmt > requestedByCto rejected). Journey visual states (pending/current/done/reject) match the state machine.

AppContext.jsx budget merge: 'utilization: Math.round((p.actualSpend / (p.approvedBudget + bonus)) * 100)' correctly recomputes after top-up approval. Verified live: Crowley approved 48.0 -> 50.0k, utilization 85% -> 82%.
TpmDashboard.jsx is missing the primary TPM workflow (daily task logging). ProjectsTable + TpmTaskLogDialog were built but not wired into any TPM-visible page. Highest-priority regression.
Non-blocking: TpmDashboard file (~330 lines) should be checked against 700-line threshold — currently OK.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — 11/13 review test items pass; TPM phase-drawer/task-log (items 2, 3, 4 partially) fail because TPM has no route to the phase-drawer.

test_credentials: Quick-login cards on /login: quick-login-tpm (Arjun Mehta), quick-login-cto (Vikram Kumar), quick-login-cfo (Priya Kapoor). No password. No Admin quick-login card in current UI.
seed_data_creation: None — used AppContext seedTopupRequests (tur-seed-1 pending-cto, tur-seed-2 pending-cfo) already present. Also created ephemeral tur-mrbs1oug via TPM /projects btn-raise-topup which persisted within that session's localStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright runs in a fresh browser context each script — localStorage is NOT shared across scripts. Seeded top-ups (tur-seed-1 pending-cto, tur-seed-2 pending-cfo) reset per session. To retest the CTO->CFO handoff end-to-end in a single script: login as CTO -> visit /topup-requests/tur-seed-1 -> partial approve -> without new context, evaluate localStorage.removeItem('ethara.session.v1') -> login as CFO -> /topup-requests/tur-seed-1 (same session, so localStorage top-up list survives) -> Approve full. VERIFIED WORKING this way in iteration 7. For CFO Dashboard phase-drawer verification, note that Crowley Generation (crowley-gen) row-toggle expands but shows no phase-view children — likely no phases seeded for that project's expandable row in mockData. Use 'talos' or later projects instead.
rca_of_the_issue: TPM daily-task-log inaccessibility RCA: (1) src/pages/Dashboard.jsx line 34 branches early to <TpmDashboard/> when role==='TPM'. (2) TpmDashboard.jsx renders bespoke widgets (upcoming phase link -> PhaseWorkspace, action lists) but never imports ProjectsTable. (3) ProjectsTable is the sole consumer of TpmTaskLogDialog (grep confirms) and the sole renderer of drawer-btn-log-task / task-log-dialog / drawer-btn-topup testids. (4) PhaseWorkspace has a separate btn-add-task flow that does NOT use TpmTaskLogDialog nor call logPhaseTask. Net effect: the feature specified in the review request ('TPM logs a task: click drawer-btn-log-task -> task-log-dialog -> task-log-submit -> log appears with log-edit/log-delete icons within 24h') is completely inaccessible to the TPM role. Mitigation: import ProjectsTable inside TpmDashboard (below the KPI cards) so TPM sees their visibleProjects with expandable phase drawers, OR alternatively add a 'Log task / Raise top-up' section to PhaseWorkspace that renders <TpmTaskLogDialog/> + <TopupRequestDialog defaultPhaseId=phase.id/>.
